fields.name: Analysis Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the application area of the analysis line template. The following options are available:
Sales: The analysis line template was set up in Sales & Receivables
Purchase: The analysis line template was set up in Purchases & Payables
Inventory: The analysis line template was set up in Inventory

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the analysis line template.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the analysis line template.

fields.name: Default Column Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the column template name that you have set up for this analysis report.

fields.name: Item Analysis View Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the analysis view that the analysis report is based on.
